transcript.text:
We've been so busy, so we didn't even have time to be on TV
First time in 25 years being on film?
Can I eat everything that's over there?
[We shouldn't have agreed]
[First time on film in 25 years]
[Tteokboki (Spicy Rice Cake)]
[Are you going to eat everything?]
[Yes]
[With tteokboki's friends]
[Complete]
You're a pretty pig
Hello everyone
I'm here near Dongguk University
I've been told that there's a restaurant here popular amongst the students
The owner of this video said that they've never advertised their place through either TV or online
I got lucky to be the very first one to get this restaurant on film

Over here
Jinah's Tteokboki
Looks delicious
How many servings is this?
This should be about 10 servings
[Is that it?]
Does it look small? Haha no
Let's eat everything off the grill
Hello
We've been selling tteokboki for 25 years
We've been way too busy to be on documents or programs
Really?
I approved without her permission
I would've said no
Thank me
First time in 25 years

Excuse me
Can I eat everything off the grill?
[Why'd you approve?]
Go ahead How about other customers?
We can make a fresh batch rather quickly, so it's okay
[The owner next door came by to see Tzuyang]
That's not going to be enough
She doesn't even breathe
Bye Tzuyang
This alone is 7 servings
Who eats like this?
Can I have fried snacks too?
Thank you
Bon appetit
I love rice cake Is this with rice or flour?
[I guess this one's made with rice)

It's a very chewy rice cake
It's a gochujang with a very strong sweet flavor
You really can't go wrong with this flavor
It's very plump
The fishcake is also very thick
This is just what I like
Worker: Skewers!
Skewers!
I really love this plump rice cake
Right?
It's something like I used to eat as a kid
A sweet gochujang flavor
[Tastes very homemade]
Idk why I crave tteokboki so much these days
[Maybe because she's Korean]
So good

Fried seaweed roll
Sweet
I like putting soy sauce inside
Tteokboki and fishcake soup combination
Brings me back to the good times
Time for some soup
[She knows what's up]
I'm already finished with 1 plate?!
It's so plump
The uniqueness of rice cakes made with rice
It's just so chewy
A very delicious rice cake
It's a good thing they use the fishcake I like
The thin ones never fill me up
[More soup]
Thank you

[Refilling soy sauce too]
Hot!!
[She needs some Kimbap]
Thank you
So glossy!
Look at the sesame oil
I can already tell that it's going to be tasty
They used the most basic ingredients
It's so good
Oh no This one is busted
[Correctly this time]
So soft Not dry at all
Do you guys like rice cake made with rice or flour?
Let me know
[The comment section is going to be a war]
[Watching Tzuyang's mukbang live]

Do you think she can do it?
[Shakes head 'no']
They gave me extra on the house Scraped the rest off the grill
[No wonder this one's a full plate]
[Let's heat it up for her]
We'll re-heat these up for you Thank you
I should've ordered them 1 by 1
You have another fan here The word is spreading fast
[Tzuyang's subscriber]
[Trying to get him to subscribe]
Dad doesn't watch mukbangs He only watches trot singers
[Re-heated in a pot]
Fishcake
It's huge
[Looks at menu]
2 for 1,000 Won? (~$0.87 USD)

It's really hard to find fishcake at that price these days And these are huge
Rice cake
This looks like a lot of food now Since they're put together
Hot!
I heard that their instant cheese tteokboki is delicious too
I'll have to try that out next time
I can't eat multiple pieces in 1 bite because the rice cakes are so big
[2 is possible though]
It's been a while since I've eaten this many rice cakes
Let's heat it up a little bit
Rice cake, fishcake, fried snacks
3 piece skewer
Oh no
Not a single day I don't get my shirt dirty
Let's put them in here
I wonder who came up with this combination

How do they go together so well?
They sell alcohol here
I guess the students come here to drink often
The university is not back open yet, right?
Online only because of covid
So I guess the restaurants around the university are struggling right now because of covid?
[Especially for the restaurants that serve students on a daily basis]
[We love and support all self-employed businesses~!]
[Thumbs up from the police]
Thank you
[Witnessing a special incident of crime prevention]
Excuse me,
Can I have a bowl of Ramyun noodles?
Thank you
That's a huge bowl
You must get this when you're at tteokboki restaurants

Looks good
Ramyun with eggs
It's been a long time since I had only 1 pack of ramyun
Is 1 pack usually gone in 2 chopsticks?
How do people live through the day with just 1?
Too small
[What kind of ramyun is this?]
It confuses me when there's eggs inside
I don't think it's Shin Ramyun
[Sees the box] Oh it's Shin Ramyun
Please edit that out I must protect my reputation as a mukbang YouTuber
[No way]
[Let's just say it was a mistake]
Ramyun+fishcake
Let's dip that in to get it warm
[Finished the tteokboki pot]

Fishcake skewer with ramyun soup
[Anything is good with ramyun soup]
Get the kimbap
Dip it in the soup
This is it
1 last piece
[Finished]
[Can't help but to clap]
I have a belly
How are you not fat?
You're a pretty pig
It was a very honorable day because I was the very first person to film at their restaurant in 25 years
Thank you
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
